positive: Minimalist geometric sloth hanging from a crescent moon, composed in a circular, central vignette. The sloth is depicted with clean, thick silhouettes and stylized jungle vines wrapping around its limbs. Style: Negative space art, mid-century modern, Art Deco influence. Color palette: Deep sapphire blue, muted olive green, warm cream off-white, and matte black accents. Composition must be symmetrical and scalable for clothing print. Lighting: Flat, directional, high contrast, creating strong shadows and clear negative space. Print-friendly, vector art quality, solid colors, designed for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, detailed face, complex anatomy, gradient, low contrast, photorealistic, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy
